experiences.title: CEO UK & Group Chief Commercial Officer
Joint Managing Director UK, Ocean Outdoor

experiences.company: The Artisan Drinks Co | B Corp
experiences.title: Board Member
Chief Commercial Strategy Officer, UK
experiences.description:
Working with our CFO, I am responsible for the current and future financial health of MediaCom in the UK. I ensure that we have the correct information, people and partnerships to make the best investment decisions for our clients and our business. 
As the pace of change renders some of the old agency models redundant it is my role to create deals and commercial relationships that will give us market-leading tools and services and deliver new revenue streams.

experiences.title: Head of Trading & Investment
experiences.description:
My role involved leading and managing a successful Trading team with responsibility for people, income and the integration of buying into the wider business. The Investment team comprises 160 employees across all areas of media buying and operations. It is a high performing team that handles hundreds of media campaigns per month with tough buying guarantees. As such my role was to ensure that we were connected with the wider business, that information flowed both ways and that we were making the right strategic decisions for our clients and our business. 

This was a varied role that encompassed managing the relationship with GroupM, leading new business pitches and responsibility for the development of relationships and products that had a substantial effect on our profitability.
